description: Join our small but mighty frontend team to ship AI-augmented logistics dashboards. You'll own UI components end-to-end and collaborate with the AI team on intelligent search and recommendation features.
responsibilities: Build and maintain Next.js 15 App Router pages and layouts
Integrate OpenAI API for smart suggestion features
Design pixel-perfect UI using Tailwind CSS & shadcn/ui
Write end-to-end tests with Playwright
requirements: Strong proficiency in React and TypeScript
Familiarity with REST/GraphQL APIs
Eye for UI/UX detail
B.Tech/B.E. in CS or equivalent (2023–2025 grad)

description: Help us build and evolve Blade, Razorpay's open-source design system. You'll partner closely with design to ensure every component is accessible, beautiful, and developer-friendly.
responsibilities: Develop reusable components for the Blade design system
Write Storybook stories and visual regression tests
Collaborate with Figma designs to achieve pixel-parity
Maintain accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) across all components
requirements: Proficiency in React with TypeScript
Understanding of CSS custom properties and theming
Familiarity with Figma
Knowledge of accessibility best practices

description: Pluto AI is building the future of personal productivity with large language models. As our first full-stack hire, you'll build user-facing features and backend pipelines that power our LLM-driven assistant.
responsibilities: Build full-stack features from design to deployment
Develop LangChain-based agent pipelines and prompt templates
Integrate Supabase for auth and real-time data
Ship fast with a lean team — from idea to production in days
requirements: Experience with Next.js and at least one backend framework
Curiosity about AI/LLMs and prompt engineering
Ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment
Strong communication skills

description: Join Infosys BPM as an associate engineer and rotate through client-facing projects spanning banking, insurance, and retail domains using Java microservices architecture.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain Java Spring Boot microservices
Write and optimize SQL queries on Oracle DB
Participate in agile ceremonies and sprint deliveries
Document technical specifications
requirements: B.Tech/BE in CS, IT, or related field (2024–2025 batch)
Knowledge of Core Java and OOP
Basic understanding of Spring framework
Willingness to relocate to Pune or assigned location

description: Codeant is reimagining how developers review and improve code using AI. As a Product Engineer, you'll own the dashboard and IDE plugin frontend, and integrate cutting-edge AI models into delightful developer experiences.
responsibilities: Build the Codeant web dashboard in React + TypeScript
Integrate Hugging Face and OpenAI APIs for code analysis features
Collaborate with designers to craft intuitive developer UX
Contribute to the VS Code extension frontend
requirements: Solid React and TypeScript skills
Interest in developer tools or AI-powered applications
Strong attention to design detail
Proactive and self-driven mindset
